tasks.summary: Upgrade OWASP ZAP to full active scan in post-deployment.yml
tasks.description: Replace the current zaproxy/action-baseline@v1 with zaproxy/action-full-scan@v1 in post-deployment.yml. Add .zap/rules.tsv with severity thresholds. The full scan performs active spidering, XSS/injection tests, and auth-aware scanning.

tasks.summary: Add flaky test detection with pytest-rerunfailures
tasks.description:
1. Add pytest-rerunfailures to requirements.txt
2. Update pytest.ini to include --reruns 1 --reruns-delay 5
3. Update ci-quality.yml unit test command to include --reruns flags
4. Tests that fail with httpx.ConnectError (the most common CI flake) are automatically retried once

acceptance_criteria.description: pytest-rerunfailures installs and imports without error

tasks.summary: Create SLO report script and Makefile target
tasks.description: Create scripts/slo-report.sh that computes: deployment frequency (last 30 days), change failure rate (failed deploys / total deploys), mean time to recovery. Uses gh CLI to query workflow run history. Add make test-slos target that runs the script.

acceptance_criteria.description: Script outputs deploy frequency as a number
Script outputs change failure rate as a percentage

tasks.description: Create docs/DEPLOYMENT_STRATEGY.md documenting the future canary architecture: traffic splitter → 95% stable / 5% canary → monitor 5 min → promote or rollback. Include prerequisites (K8s, ≥2 replicas, load balancer), step-by-step flow, and rollback triggers.
